All fake data seeding has been removed. Here's a summary of the changes:
- `apps/web/src/data/seed.ts` — entire 1348-line file with 80+ fake entries (vocabulary, tasks, grammar, writing, speaking, reading, listening, mistakes, mock tests, passages, topics progress)
- `apps/web/src/app/App.tsx` — same removal, also removed unused `LoadingSpinner` import
- `packages/content/src/built-in/*` and `packages/content/src/seeding.ts` — these are actual IELTS study content (topics, passages, prompts), not fake data
- `apps/web/src/features/settings/Settings.tsx` — defaults, `handleResetSample` function, and "Reset Sample Data" button
**Validation:** All 81 data-layer tests pass; pre-existing failures in landing page/component tests are unrelated.

details.text: [✓] Add pagination types and findAllPaginated to BaseRepository
[✓] Update Mistakes.tsx to use paginated data
[✓] Update Vocabulary.tsx to use paginated data
All pre-existing failures are unrelated (DOM rendering issues in other components).
Added pagination support across the data fetching layer and two list-display pages:
- Added `findAllPaginated(params?)` using Dexie's `offset()`/`limit()` for efficient IndexedDB pagination
- Accessible pagination UI component with prev/next buttons, page numbers with ellipsis, current page highlight
- `paginatedEntries` memo slices the filtered list to current page
- Shows pagination controls + "Showing X–Y of Z" when items exceed page size
- Resets to page 1 when any filter changes
